hero.subtitle: Crafting scalable, performant web applications with modern technologies and a passion for clean architecture.

about.label: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a mid-level software developer with a deep love for creating elegant, user-centric web applications. With experience spanning frontend and backend technologies, I bring ideas to life through clean architecture and performant code.
about.paragraph2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new frameworks, contributing to open-source projects, and continuously pushing the boundaries of what's possible on the web.

items.title: E-Commerce Platform
items.description: A full-stack e-commerce solution with real-time inventory, payment integration, and admin dashboard.

items.title: Task Management App
items.description: Collaborative project management tool with drag-and-drop boards, real-time updates, and analytics.

items.title: Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Interactive data visualization dashboard with custom charts, filters, and export capabilities.

items.title: Portfolio CMS
items.description: Headless CMS for managing content with markdown support, media uploads, and SEO tools.
Developed enterprise applications with Angular and .NET, implementing responsive interfaces, user management, and admin modules with Google Sign-In authentication.

Built frontend features with Angular integrating external libraries and consuming .NET backend APIs. Implemented Google Sign-In authentication, role-based route protection, and collaborated on integration and deployment processes using Azure DevOps.

Developed web interfaces with Angular and TypeScript, implementing reusable components and responsive design. Integrated REST APIs, configured authentication with Firebase Authentication, and connected billing services through Alegra.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision. Let's build something amazing together.
